title: Ground-truth eval case (system-effect grading)
description: A conversation eval case whose pass/fail is determined by the system effect at the end: which tables get written, which reads fire, what status the entity ends in, what cross-module updates happen. Bot-text quality is NOT graded here.

kind.description: What the system should ultimately do for this case.

writes.description: Ordered list of expected commit actions. For multi-commit cases (Create→Amend) include each in sequence.

activity.description: Activity that owns this task (e.g. POCRT)

via_sp_chain.description: Expected SP call chain (informational; derived from catalog)

tables_required.description: Tables that MUST be touched by INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE in this commit

slot_values_required.description: Slot name → expected value. EXACT match required. Use 'ANY' for slot must be present with any value. Use 'PLACEHOLDER:<x>' for templated values like dates.

status_after.description: Document status after this commit (Draft / Authorised / Hold / Closed)

reads.description: Expected read queries (for lookup / view cases).

task.description: Read TRANS task name (typically <Act>ENTTRN1 for search)

filter_slots.description: Slot → value used as query filter

returns_fields.description: Fields the bot's reply should surface from the read

no_writes_expected.description: True for discovery, error-recovery, and pure-lookup cases — bot must NOT fire any TRANS that writes to tables.

cross_module_writes.description: Cross-module side effects (e.g. PR status flips to Covered when PO covers it).

must_enumerate_information.description: For discovery cases: the information set the bot must convey (one of N expected topics/journeys must be named).
